stays.name: Casa Cabane
stays.sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026 plus local owner-approved Casa Cabane media
stays.description: Casa Cabane is the first complete House of Wander stay prototype: a cinematic gateway, full-screen walkthrough, Airbnb-informed practical detail, and Amigo as the guest guide before the final Airbnb handoff.

stays.name: Casa Fabiola
stays.sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; photos need owner approval before use
stays.description: Casa Fabiola is the Ghent city stay in the collection: a private upper-floor apartment in the family townhouse, rooted in family, heritage, comfort, and a very practical station-side location.

stays.name: Louise Marie
stays.sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; photos need owner approval before use
stays.description: Louise Marie is the Ostend seaside chapter in the House of Wander collection, inspired by a promise from Laurens to Maaike and now backed by public Airbnb facts.

stays.name: Thelma & Louise
stays.sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; internal Thelma & Louise naming still needs host confirmation
stays.description: Thelma & Louise is mapped to the Stefanie-hosted Blankenberge apartment from Laurens’ account links. The public Airbnb facts are integrated, while the internal brand-name match should still be confirmed by the team.

stays.name: Heritage Collection
stays.sourceStatus: Briefing concept only; five children/apartment names and Airbnb URLs still needed
stays.description: The Heritage Collection is described as five family apartments in Ostend, developed with a cherished family friend and named with a sense of children, tribute, and legacy.

stays.name: The Love Nest
stays.sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; photos need owner approval before use
stays.description: The Love Nest is the clearest co-hosted addition in the public listings: a cosy Ostend penthouse for two, close to the beach, with terraces, outdoor pool/shower, and Laurens listed as co-host.

stays.name: Ghent Group House
stays.sourceStatus: Public Airbnb facts checked May 27, 2026; collection role needs host confirmation
stays.description: This public Airbnb listing is co-hosted by Laurens and adds a strong group-stay option to the House of Wander data model. Its final House of Wander brand role still needs confirmation.

productionLanes: Casa Cabane remains the flagship proof-of-feel and keeps local approved media plus the guided walkthrough.
All provided public Airbnb URLs now map into structured stay records, including Casa Fabiola, Louise Marie, Thelma & Louise, The Love Nest, and the Ghent Group House.
Heritage Collection remains a parent concept until the five apartment names and URLs are confirmed.
Airbnb photo URLs are catalogued as reference-only; the public site still uses local media or placeholders until owner approval.
Amigo remains a source-aware scripted guide with boundaries around live price, availability, payment, Airbnb messaging, and direct booking.
Private Airbnb conversation ingestion is documented as a GDPR/channel-manager future path, not executed through risky logged-in scraping.

amigoSystem.title: Guest guide
amigoSystem.text: Amigo helps visitors choose a stay, understand practical details, and move from atmosphere to Airbnb handoff without menu diving.

amigoSystem.title: Source labels
amigoSystem.text: Amigo distinguishes public Airbnb data, briefing notes, prototype copy, owner-approved media, and host confirmations still needed.

amigoSystem.title: Host cockpit later
amigoSystem.text: Later, Maaike, Laudi, and Laurens can use Amigo and Toon to organize questions, Airbnb messages, direct inquiries, rules, and stay updates.

styleVariants.name: Editorial Warm
styleVariants.description: Cinematic serif, warm ivory, moss, clay, and restrained gold. Recommended flagship style.

styleVariants.name: Coastal Light
styleVariants.description: Brighter, airier, and more seaside. Best first test for Ostend and Blankenberge stays.

styleVariants.name: Boutique Night
styleVariants.description: Darker and more intimate, suited to romantic hideaways and evening-led storytelling.

amigoPrompts.label: Which stays are ready now?
amigoPrompts.answer: Casa Cabane, Casa Fabiola, Louise Marie, Thelma & Louise, The Love Nest, and the Ghent Group House now have structured public Airbnb facts. Heritage Collection still needs the five unit names and URLs.

amigoPrompts.label: Can you use Airbnb photos?
amigoPrompts.answer: Not on the site yet. Airbnb-hosted image URLs are catalogued as references only. Owner-approved exports are needed before House of Wander displays them.

amigoPrompts.label: How does booking work now?
amigoPrompts.answer: For now, House of Wander guides the decision and Airbnb handles live dates, price, rules, cancellation, payment, and guest-host messaging.

amigoPrompts.label: What about Amigo and Toon?
amigoPrompts.answer: Amigo is the guest-facing guide now. Toon and private Airbnb conversation training need a safe GDPR export or channel-manager path first, not risky logged-in scraping.
